# Daniela Reinoso | People & Culture Systems

> Daniela Reinoso helps mission-driven organizations — nonprofits and mission-driven companies — intentionally design people practices, leadership habits, and organizational systems that create clarity, build trust, and support sustainable growth. Over a decade of experience in people strategy and organizational development in the nonprofit sector.

## Services

- [People Systems Scan](https://danielareinoso.co/services.html): A three-week diagnostic that maps where an organization's people systems create drag, risk, or confusion, resulting in a 90-day plan. Typical investment: USD $3,500+.
- [People Systems Build](https://danielareinoso.co/services.html): Building the specific people systems an organization needs most, documented and handed off to the team. Typical investment: USD $8,000–$20,000+.
- [Ongoing Advisory](https://danielareinoso.co/services.html): Ongoing senior counsel for implementation, people decisions, and change leadership. Typical investment: USD $2,500–$6,000/month.

## Pages

- [About](https://danielareinoso.co/about.html): Daniela Reinoso's background and philosophy.
- [Approach](https://danielareinoso.co/approach.html): How Daniela works with clients.
- [The People Systems Scan](https://danielareinoso.co/scan.html): Details of the diagnostic offer.
- [Resources](https://danielareinoso.co/people_systems_snapshot.html): Free resource on people systems.
- [Work Together](https://danielareinoso.co/work-together.html): How to start an engagement.
